title: Gap Closure, Deliberate Practice, and Honest Positioning
description: The role matrix exposes a few high-value gaps, but the candidate starts another broad course instead of testing whether each gap blocks real work. Learners cumulatively produce time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
Precommit a time, evidence, and opportunity-cost stop rule for readiness work.
